name: com.bnj.so-manager
description: Editor window for browsing, creating, duplicating, renaming, and deleting ScriptableObject assets. Tag any ScriptableObject class with [ManageableData] to register it as a managed type. Requires Odin Inspector. Automatically defines the SO_MANAGER scripting define symbol on import, allowing other packages to use [ManageableData] optionally without a hard dependency.
